principles.rule: Material workflow decisions must be derived from accepted facts, question proofs, inference rules, state-machine transitions, and invariants before any LLM executor is invoked.
LLM output, research findings, and unvalidated extraction results may create candidate facts only. Candidate facts can route to research or manual_review, not write execution.

Workflow state, questions, decisions, facts, transitions, prompts, execution units, and results must be represented as bounded JSON packets. Markdown is explanatory only unless explicitly declared as authority by catalog.
Role prompts must be compiled from accepted semantic facts, decision proofs, inference proofs, fresh file contexts, and role profiles. Full-file reads require explicit proof.
File-context records, graph facts, and extracted code facts must carry source hashes. Stale facts cannot unlock write-scoped execution.
Self-improvement must be driven by execution traces, invariant failures, degradation events, and repeated blockers; not by unbounded prompt reflection.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add formal semantics kernel for bears workflow logic
formal_chain.purpose: Define semantic types, relations, accepted/candidate facts, closed-world authority, and validators.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add executable question calculus for decision graphs
formal_chain.purpose: Represent workflow decisions as typed questions, accepted answers, proof paths, and unlocked gates.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add Datalog-style inference engine for workflow facts
formal_chain.purpose: Derive context, role, executor, file-scope, parallelism, and closeout permissions from accepted facts and stratified rules.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add formal workflow state-machine semantics
formal_chain.purpose: Replace ad-hoc status strings with validated states, transitions, guards, evidence requirements, and invariants.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add code property graph extraction for governed repositories
formal_chain.purpose: Extract AST, symbol, import, call, schema, catalog, script, command, and validator facts from governed files.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add proof-driven prompt compiler and context pack assembly
formal_chain.purpose: Compile minimal role prompts from accepted facts, decision proofs, inference proofs, fresh context, and role profiles.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add model-checking invariants for orchestrator safety
formal_chain.purpose: Check safety, liveness, scope, closeout, storage-authority, and parallelism invariants before execution and closeout.

formal_chain.title: P0: Add process-mining feedback loop for workflow self-improvement
formal_chain.purpose: Compare event traces with formal workflow models and generate bounded improvement candidates for repeated failures, gaps, drift, and cost regressions.

related_runtime_chain.title: P0: Add goal-state orchestrator for Codex exec role workflows
P0: Add cumulative file-context memory index for goal orchestration
P0: Add file-scoped execution plan and session reuse pool
P0: Add workspace semantic graph and metadata store
P0: Add Codex workflow execution decision gates
P0: Add validatable goals and principles contract

store_specific_contracts.rule: Do not introduce additional named storage technologies in this contract without a separate approved issue.
